message:
feat(tui): persistent theme config, explorer metric selector, and KPI tile dashboard

Style system:
- Added ThemeConfig with JSON persistence: load/save from ~/.config/cass/theme.json
  with versioned schema, hex color validation, and per-slot color overrides for 19
  semantic color slots (primary, secondary, accent, background, surface, etc.).
- UiThemePreset now derives Serialize/Deserialize with kebab-case serde aliases
  (e.g., "high_contrast", "hc", "cat" all resolve correctly).
- ThemeColorOverrides validates hex color format and applies overrides to the
  resolved theme via apply_overrides_to_builder.

App state:
- ExplorerMetric enum: cycle through ApiTokens/ContentTokens/Messages/ToolCalls/
  PlanMessages/Cost with next/prev navigation.
- ExplorerOverlay enum: toggle between None and ByAgent overlay modes.
- Undo/redo restore logic simplified: search_changed now properly triggers
  SearchRequested, while grouping_changed triggers regroup_panes independently.
- analytics_selectable_count() added for keyboard navigation within subviews.

Analytics charts:
- AnalyticsChartData expanded with daily_content_tokens, daily_tool_calls,
  daily_plan_messages, daily_cost series and corresponding totals.
- Dashboard view refactored: KPI tile grid (2×3) with sparklines for each metric,
  top agents horizontal bar chart, and aggregate token sparkline.
- Explorer view renders metric-specific line charts with overlay support,
  including per-agent series when ByAgent overlay is active.
- render_kpi_tiles renders individual metric cards with formatted values and
  inline sparklines for trend visualization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
